{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.4": 2, "R1.7": 3, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "Mentions prior work but lacks specific comparison and fails to map against multiple relevant works.",
    "R1.7": "Identifies a missing citation (HNSW) and potentially an incorrect categorization of ScaNN.",
    "RX.1": "Presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly covers the requested dimensions but misses some relevant aspects like HNSW and IVF/IVFADC.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions identified in the critique.",
    "RX.5": "Critique lacks traceability of changes and reasoning behind them."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: Mentions prior work but lacks specific comparison and fails to map against multiple relevant works.
rationale.R1.7: Identifies a missing citation (HNSW) and potentially an incorrect categorization of ScaNN.
rationale.RX.1: Presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly covers the requested dimensions but misses some relevant aspects like HNSW and IVF/IVFADC.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions identified in the critique.
rationale.RX.5: Critique lacks traceability of changes and reasoning behind them.
